qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_mot_devolucion as oi_mot_devolucion, t0.c_mot_devolucion as c_mot_devolucion, t0.d_mot_devolucion as d_mot_devolucion, SEC.policy, t0.c_mot_devolucion as CODE, t0.d_mot_devolucion as TEXT FROM PER38_MOT_DEVOLUCION as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.Mot_Devolucion.MOT_DEVOLUCION\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_mot_devolucion LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_mot_devolucion asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_mot_devolucion as oi_mot_devolucion, SEC.policy FROM PER38_MOT_DEVOLUCION as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.Mot_Devolucion.MOT_DEVOLUCION\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_mot_devolucion LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_mot_devolucion asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Personal.Mot_Devolucion.MOT_DEVOLUCION.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Personal.Mot_Devolucion.MOT_DEVOLUCION.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(PER38_MOT_DEVOLUCION.oi_mot_devolucion) as CNT from PER38_MOT_DEVOLUCION Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and PER38_MOT_DEVOLUCION.oi_mot_devolucion={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(PER38_MOT_DEVOLUCION.d_mot_devolucion,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(PER38_MOT_DEVOLUCION.c_mot_devolucion,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
